description: Body Node Chirality is a ProtoFlux node that takes a Node (BodyNode) and returns whether it's on the left or right side of the human body, or -1 if it's a "None" body node or in the center.

fields.Node: The body node to check if it is on the left or right side of the body.
fields.* ([[Type:Chirality|Chirality]]): Returns if Node (BodyNode) is on the left or right side of a human body. Returns null if the node is in the center of the body or "None".
